node.statement: (Scattering channel complexity) For inclusive scattering Φ_S(ρ) = Tr_unobs(S ρ S†) with k conservation laws as linear constraints on the Choi matrix, BP gives Kraus rank r ≤ ⌊√(d_in² + k)⌋. The bound is universal: it depends only on the number of constraints, not on interaction details.
